subcodes.first_line: The mercy that hath shone forth and become manifest from the horizon of the bounty of the Lord of Creation be upon thee, O Guide of humanity and Destroyer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رحمه التی ظهرت و لاحت من افق فضل مالک الایجاد علیک یا هادی الانام و هادم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for forgiveness, @visitation Tablets, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection
